title: Jam MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Jam MCP Server for Claude

Debug faster with AI agents that access video recordings, console logs, and network requests

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Jam
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `debugging` `jam` `testing` `bug-tracking` `developer-tools`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jam
```

## Config
```json
{
  "jam": {
    "url": "https://mcp.jam.dev/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jam

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/jam-mcp-server
- https://jam.dev/docs/debug-a-jam/mcp
